prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for pyridine were computed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, with charge 0 and multiplicity 1 for the neutral reference state. The cation (charge +1, multiplicity 2) and anion (charge −1, multiplicity 2) were also computed. Partial charges were computed using the Mulliken scheme. The input geometry was fixed (no re-optimization). SCF converged for all three species; charge-conservation checks on Fukui indices f⁺ and f⁻ both passed (sum = 1.00). The most electrophilic site is nitrogen (atom 0, f⁺ = 0.484), and the most nucleophilic sites are the ortho carbons (atoms 2 and 3, f⁻ = 0.118). Integrity status: trustworthy = true. Visualization saved to agent call output directory.</prose>
